ChatPanel.emptyState: I am your AI assistant for document redaction. Upload a document to start the conversation.

ModeSelector.cloudDesc: GDPR-compliant, no data retention, no model training.
ModeSelector.localBrowserDesc: Runs entirely in your browser. No data leaves your device.
ModeSelector.localLlmDesc: Runs on your organisation's infrastructure. No data leaves your network.
ModeSelector.localSpacyDesc: Rule-based detection on your organisation's infrastructure. No data leaves your network.

App.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to select
App.exportTooltip: PDF with visible yellow highlights — for review and approval
App.redactTooltip: Text irreversibly removed — ready for publication
App.modeSwitchDesc: Pending suggestions will be removed. Accepted and manual redactions are kept.

About.heroDesc: EasyRedact combines an intelligent AI assistant with a PDF viewer — for redactions under data protection and freedom of information law.
About.workflowTitle: Three steps to a redacted document
About.step1Desc: PDF or DOCX via drag & drop. Multiple documents at once.
About.step2Desc: Assistant reads the document, suggests redactions. Review and adjust suggestions.
About.step3Desc: Preview PDF or final version with irreversibly removed text.
About.featureAIDesc: A chat agent reads the document, asks targeted follow-up questions, and suggests all relevant redactions in one step — with a confidence score for each suggestion.
About.featureListDesc: All redactions in chronological order or grouped by person. Accept or reject suggestions with one click — individually or in bulk.
About.featureFOIDesc: In FOI mode, each redaction is assigned a specific legal reason — §3–6 German Freedom of Information Act, EU Regulation 1049/2001, and other legal systems.
About.featureManualDesc: Select text by click-and-drag or freehand directly in the document. Accept or reject assistant suggestions with one click.
About.featureGroupDesc: Redactions are grouped by person and category in the left sidebar. All entries for a person can be accepted or rejected at once.
About.featureMultiDocDesc: Upload PDFs and DOCX files as a batch. The assistant has context over all documents simultaneously and can make cross-document suggestions.
About.featurePrivacyDesc: Choose between Cloud AI (GDPR-compliant, no data retention) or Local AI on your own infrastructure — without any cloud connection.
About.featureMetadataDesc: View and selectively remove PDF metadata — author, title, creation date, software — before export. No hidden information leaks.
About.featureDocxDesc: Upload Word documents alongside PDFs. DOCX files are automatically converted to PDF via LibreOffice before processing (Docker deployment).
About.featureExportDesc: Preview export with visible highlights for internal review. Final export with irreversibly removed text — ready for publication.
About.featureI18nDesc: Full interface in English, German, French, Spanish, Russian, Arabic (RTL), and Chinese. FOI exemption rules for multiple jurisdictions. Switch anytime.

Deployment.label: Deployment
Deployment.title: Run it your way
Deployment.onlineDesc: Try EasyRedact instantly in your browser — no installation, no setup.
Deployment.onlineStandard: Cloud AI via Azure OpenAI (GDPR-compliant, EU data centre)
Deployment.onlineClassified: In-browser NLP for classified documents (coming soon)
Deployment.premiseDesc: Deploy on your own infrastructure for full control over data flows and compliance.
Deployment.premiseStandard: Cloud AI via Azure OpenAI (bring your own key)
Deployment.premiseClassifiedLlm: Local LLMs (Ollama, vLLM, etc.) for GPU servers
Deployment.premiseClassifiedNer: Local NER via spaCy for standard hardware

Compliance.label: Compliance
Compliance.title: Ready for your approval process
Compliance.desc: EasyRedact ships with comprehensive compliance documentation covering GDPR, BSI IT-Grundschutz, and the EU AI Act. These templates are designed for deploying organisations to adapt for their internal approval process.
Compliance.descNonDe: Compliance documentation is currently available in German. An English version is planned.

Onboarding.title: Before you start
Onboarding.subtitle: Please take a moment to read these notices before using EasyRedact.
Onboarding.reviewDesc: The AI can miss redactions or flag incorrect passages. You are personally responsible for checking every suggestion before exporting.
Onboarding.cloudDesc: Document text is sent to Microsoft Azure (EU, Sweden). GDPR-compliant — no data retention, no model training.
Onboarding.localDesc: Document text never leaves your device or organisation's infrastructure. Recommended for classified or particularly sensitive material.
Onboarding.classifiedDesc: For classified or otherwise sensitive documents, do not use Cloud AI. Switch to Local AI using the toggle in the right panel.
Onboarding.changeLater: You can change this at any time using the mode toggle in the top-right of the analysis panel.
Onboarding.acknowledgement: I have read and understood these notices and accept personal responsibility for reviewing all redaction suggestions.

RedactConfirm.title: Redact and download
RedactConfirm.detail: The downloaded PDF will have all marked passages securely redacted — underlying text and images are permanently removed.
RedactConfirm.description: You are responsible for the completeness and accuracy of the redactions. Do not rely blindly on the AI — review all suggestions before downloading.
